description: Demonstrates datasource-level data links across logs, time_series, traces and flamegraph formats. Configured on the `clickhouse` datasource via provisioning.

options.content:
**Data Links** attach clickable shortcuts to columns in query results — configured once on the datasource (*Connections → clickhouse → Data Links*, or via YAML provisioning) and applied automatically wherever the matching column appears.

**Typical use cases:**
- **Logs → traces** — click a `trace_id` / `query_id` in a log row to jump to the full trace or related queries
- **Drill-down** — click a `severity` / `service` / `user_id` value to see all related entries
- **Span → logs / metrics** — click a trace span field to open Loki, Prometheus, or another ClickHouse query
- **External jumps** — open Jaeger UI, a runbook, GitHub source, or any URL with the cell value interpolated

Try it on the panels below. In Explore, clicks open the target in a split pane on the right; in dashboards, in a new Explore tab.

panels.description: Hover any cell on `severity`, `body`, or `timestamp` columns — a Data Links popover appears (configured per-field on the datasource).

targets.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query: SELECT event_time AS timestamp, level AS severity, message AS content, query_id FROM system.text_log WHERE $timeFilter ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Logs · links on severity / body / timestamp

panels.description: Click any point on the line — `log_count` (the value/metric field) carries the data link. Grafana time-series viz surfaces the popover from the clicked value field, not the time axis.

targets.query: SELECT $timeSeries AS t, count() AS log_count FROM system.text_log WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Time series · link on value field (log_count)

panels.description: Expand a span — clickable links appear on `operationName` and `traceID` fields.

targets.query: SELECT trace_id AS traceID, span_id AS spanID, operation_name AS operationName, parent_span_id AS parentSpanID, 'clickhouse' AS serviceName, intDiv(finish_time_us - start_time_us, 1000) AS duration, intDiv(start_time_us, 1000) AS startTime, attribute AS tags, map('hostName', hostname) AS serviceTags FROM system.opentelemetry_span_log WHERE $timeFilter ORDER BY finish_time_us DESC LIMIT 500

panels.title: Traces · links on operationName / traceID

title: Data Links Demo
